comment: Man Josh butts is really out here dropping the philosophical wisdom of the ancients

display_name: Call it like I see it
comment: Sometimes a POS is just a POS and it shouldn't matter if the company agrees. When you're a POS, there's little room for anyone to disagree.

Moes tavern moe speaking. Im looking for a last name butts. First name seymore.

I need a seymore butts guys. Seymore butts!!!
Happy Easter to everyone. Hope you have a good one if you are off, and if you are working get that Sunday premium!
Oh no, Butts got called out for talking shit and stopped talking shit?
lol you say that anonymously
I hope this site creates more turmoil like the past ones have.
Semore butts

It is one thing to be critical of union officials. It is another to make statements that side with the company on members jobs. I feel sorry for the plate mill to have you as their representation Josh Butts. 
Anonymously only goes so far.

Now nipsco locals are locked out! 
Two large locals in a short time span. Make sure you are preparing for September

This site is laughable.  It's clear that it's only a site to target certain people because only a select few are targeted. Stop pretending to be about a brotherhood when you allow certain people to be attacked while other names are protected. You're a joke.

Once again this site is for open discussions, but I will not allow posts that could cause ill will to a members career. I’m not talking about union positions but employment. 
If you have a problem with this stance feel free to email rankfile056@gmail.com

And yes this site allows anonymous posting due to unfortunate opinions that retaliation would, could, and has happened.
But feel free to post by your name. Your speech is protected under the landrum griffon act when being critical of union officials, but be mindful it’s not always the best route to take.
Yeah I think not. I saw clear retaliation. I don’t think ill open myself up to that.
If u were on the trial then state your names. Once again hiding behind hollow statements.
Another hide behind comment, go say something to them. Bet u won’t.

I mean I would like 10% a year but I don’t think we will make it out that strong. 

I think 4 year 20% 5% a year. 
I like the sick day idea.
Im sure production is going to get their overtime taken away.
I’m hoping for 10% yearly raises, sick days and extra vacation time.
I get that but they’re still our Union brothers and sisters. We shouldn’t let them just take that away from us. If we do, then they will think they can take away OT from production side as well.
That’s a bit harsh. If anything that would fall back to management not managing a line up.
I bet its because half of them come in and sit on their thumbs and dont produce enough work to justify their OT
What’s up with the company messing with craft hours all of a sudden?

USW local 12775 which represents Nipsco brothers and sisters just authorized a strike! Their contract expires on the night of the 30th if I’m not mistaken. 

That’s two big USW employers within a month. And it’s a contract year for us. Make your plans start watching that spending now. Might be time for a fight!
How about $120,000 truck might as well go all out.
I also was part of the trial and agree with you 100%

What’s everyone’s thoughts going into bargaining for our contract? 
What are you wanting to see?
Any specific things you would like fought for?

There have been a couple posts that were not pushed through to publication. While this forum is for free speech it will. Not be allowed to be used to aid the company in their fight against our own ranks. If one wants to be critical of leadership it is fine. If one has differing opinions that is okay also. But we will not allow this page to be used as a tool for the company against our own. If you have any issues with one of your posts not appearing feel free to email rankfile056@gmail.com for further discussion.
Just don’t want to see a union brother or sister hurt or fired
Im surprised you care since it's management.
Tons of extra attention on LOTO in the plant right now… I heard a manager got fired in hot mill this week for a bad lockout
Definitely shoot it over to rankfile056@gmail.com when ever you feel like it and I’ll get it added to the site.
You go ahead and expose those people and put yourself in the limelight. Shit back some popcorn and watch the madness unfold. 😀

The fact that Dave Williams, Chris Beach, and Josh Butts are still in the hall representing out members is a joke. We need unbiased people there this next union meeting April 9th to sign up for the trial committee. Let’s expose the corruption.
Great movie

It’s going to start ramping up great day to ask about it as former international president just put out a video about it. 
Idk if I’d buy an $80,000 truck ever personally so idk if I’m the right person to speak on that lol. Personally I wouldn’t out off buying a house but everyone’s situation is different.
https://www.facebook.com/share/r/14YbQWLucfD/?mibextid=wwXIfr
Very odd opinion/observation
As soon as I read the leaflet I knew it was Bullshit and could only be one of them!
Chris Beach does the cha cha like a little sissy girl. I... do... the cha cha... like... a little.. sissy... girl.
Chris Beach is a little girl!

The upcoming contract will be my first contract. When are they going to start addressing what they are going to ask for this contract go around? Will it be as bad as BP contract talks?  Will there be layoffs? Should I buy a new house and that 80 thousand dollar truck? Any advice?

Neat site. If you want to host my pay calculator let me know. I believe it still has a holiday pay but maybe I’ll try and get that worked out. I’m sure you know how to contact me. Fb messenger, phone number is out there if you don’t already have it.

Seems they are upset about their shit being exposed and worried about being held accountable for their actions. Now they have turned to continue with their slanderous ways and lies. Spreading bullshit leaflets in multiple welfares around the plant attacking many members. Nice part about the truth the story doesn’t have to change every time you tell it.
I haven’t heard much about this the timeline I’ve heard has come and gone.
Has anyone heard anymore about the potential POSCO partnership? Seems like it’s been crickets since it was announced.

I was one of the people on the Chris Beach Trial for charges. I believe with everything Chris Beach is guilty as can be. Unfortunately I didn't feel there was concrete proof, but everything defiantly looked like it was true.
test
they need to step down now! this is disgusting
BP Whiting. I am sure there will be people at most gates if not all. Go show them your support!
Where
This is disgusting! I assume this is why charges were brought against Chris Beach and Dave Williams

At midnight 3/19/2026 British Petroleum (BP) chose to lock out our 800+ union brothers and sisters at the Whiting facility. If you can go show support im sure the picket lines are forming as we speak.

How can we allow multiple union officers that made statements to the company that caused 6 members to be out of work for many months and 1 still currently out to stay in office!? Dave Williams, Chris Beach, and Josh Butts should be ashamed of themselves. Not only did they make statements to the company, but they gave false statements to the company. They straight up lied. they should resign and be back in the shop at best or shamed into finding a different job and not even be allowed back into our shops! 

"The Grievance Chair approached the company on May 5, 2025, and he shared the details of a conversation he had with Menear shortly after Menear had been removed as an assistant griever."

Shame on you Dave Williams! This would be a disgrace if any member did these actions, but completely disgusting for the Grievance Chair!
